title: Vendor latest github.com/containers/storage
body: Update github.com/containers/storage to master(be846769b4977f3ae0c0256d50827440e72fc0b0).  This is largely about getting the changes from https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/283 here so that when we introduce a patch to containers/image that depends on the newer fields that PR introduced, its tests will pass.

comments.body: LGTM, although we should probably move to a new release of containers/storage.
Hmm, I think we're going to need https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/284, too.
